title: Glaucous Smoky Korean Myeolchi-Anchovies Tteok
description: A delicious and invigorating Korean dish featuring smoky myeolchi-anchovies, perfect for a Buddhist temple-friendly breakfast or snack. This fluffy and mustardy tteok is a delightful treat for the senses.
instructions: Combine soaked myeolchi-anchovies, glutinous rice flour, dried ginseng, and sesame oil in a mixing bowl.
Gradually add water to form a dough, kneading for 10 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into small portions and shape into tteok forms.
Heat a smoking gun or a grill to high heat and add Korean chili flakes and mustard seeds for a smoky flavor.
